items.title: Black Friday in July sale gaming monitor deals from just $90: Odyssey OLED displays from $300, LG UltraGear, more
items.summary: Best Buy’s Black Friday in July sale is now live, bringing loads of new deals on gaming monitors, while also bringing back many of the same discounts we saw during its 4th of July event earlier this month. This time around, though, there are plenty of OLED options in the mix, and you can save up to $700 by cashing in on these deals. Whether you’re after a fast OLED for competitive gaming, a high-refresh-rate QHD panel, or a large curved display for a more immersive setup, there are plenty of solid options to choose from. The sale includes models from Samsung’s Odyssey lineup, LG UltraGear, AOC, and other brands we regularly feature, with prices starting at $89.99 shipped. We’ve rounded up some of the standout gaming monitor deals below, including several that have returned to their lowest prices.

items.title: Ditch bulky MacBook chargers – Anker’s tiny 65W USB-C model is just $20 today (50% off)
items.summary:
Anker’s 65W Nano USB-C Charger

Buy for $20 (Reg. $40)

What we love

This compact Anker charger is an easy upgrade if you’re looking to replace a bulky power brick with something that’s much more travel-friendly. It’s about 58% smaller than a standard 61W USB-C charger, and the foldable prongs make it easy to toss into a backpack, laptop sleeve, or even a pocket. Despite its size, this unit can deliver up to 65W of power through its USB-C port, making it capable of charging everything from laptops and tablets to the latest iPhones, which can fast charge at up to 45W.

items.title: roborock launches premium AI-supported RockMow X120H LiDAR AWD robot mower with $699 savings to $2,500
items.summary: Roborock has officially launched its RockMow X120H LiDAR AWD Robot Lawn Mower with a deal to score it for $2,499.99 shipped exclusively on Amazon. This new autonomous mowing solution will go for $3,199 after this initial deal fades. The deal here is cutting $699 off the tag, which sets the bar for future discounts down the line. Head below to get a rundown on what you can expect from this first-time venture into robot mowers that we have seen from the popular brand. You can also find a number of its robot floor cleaner deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Bluetti’s 3-day July Member Day Sale offers exclusive deals on power stations, batteries, solar panels, more – all from $189
items.summary: Bluetti has launched its short-term July Member Day Sale that is offering exclusive member-only discounts on a collection of power stations, while other units can benefit from our two exclusive bonus savings codes, too. One solid option to ensure power wherever you go is the 2,048Wh AC200L Portable Power Station down at $1,099 shipped, with the discount for members acting as an exclusive deal that our bonus savings code cannot stack on top of, but it does beat Amazon’s pricing by $100. This unit goes for $1,199 since the brand made permanent price cuts across its lineup in May, with the deal here only beaten out by a fall to the one-time $999 during last month’s Prime Day event. You can find the power station on its own for $854.05 shipped, after using the code 9TO5TOYS5OFF at checkout, beating Amazon by $45. Be sure to also head below to check out the full lineup of member deals before they’re gone in a few days.

items.title: Black Friday in July AirPods deals now live: AirPods Pro 3 $50 off, Max 2 $100 off, more from $99
items.summary: We have now kicked in Black Friday in July season with notable deals landing across thousands of products, not the least of which include the entire current-generation AirPods lineup. The summer Black Friday events are carrying the ongoing $50 price drop on AirPods Pro 3 through alongside the lowest price in several months on AirPods 4 with ANC, and a solid $100 discount on the latest AirPods Max 2.

items.title: Refresh kitchen countertops with Ninja’s space-saving Flip 8-in-1 oven combo while back at its $150 2026 low
items.summary: Amazon is giving folks another chance to pick up its popular Flip 8-in-1 Air Fryer Toaster Oven Combo back at $149.94 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. Down from $250, we’ve consistently seen discounts bringing the costs down to this same rate throughout 2026, with this price having held out after last month’s Prime Day until a week ago when it raised back up in price. Now, it’s dropping back down with $100 savings, giving you the best price we have tracked this year that sits just $20 above the all-time low we last saw during Black Friday in 2025. There are tons more of Ninja’s appliance deals waiting for you in the official Amazon storefront here.
